title: I only watch Evangelion when Im drunk
display_title: I only watch Evangelion when Im drunk
wikitext:
[]: I only watch Evangelion when I'm drunk.             Quote Post by zpoop » Sun May 01, 2011 11:21 am That's how I originally watched it and that's the only way I'll re-watch it. It makes it so much better don't ya know?

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sun May 01, 2011 12:06 pm That´s nice and all, but don´t try to blame anything on Evangelion when you do something stupid while drunk in the near future.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun May 01, 2011 12:13 pm I once hosted an Evangelion panel while intoxicated. It was awesome.

[]:             Quote Post by Leighton » Sun May 01, 2011 12:14 pm InstrumentalityOne wrote: That´s nice and all, but don´t try to blame anything on Evangelion when you do something stupid while sober in the near future.

[]:             Quote Post by SenorSquiid » Sun May 01, 2011 2:13 pm Drunk is fine, but I've found it to be even better on more exotic intoxicants.

[]:             Quote Post by MaskedOmega » Sun May 01, 2011 2:51 pm I am feeling a drunk EVA marathon coming up.

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Sun May 01, 2011 5:59 pm What a waste of beer.

[]:             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Sun May 01, 2011 6:14 pm To alcohol! The cause of, and solution to, all of life's problems. (what a way to celebrate 500 posts...)

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon May 02, 2011 9:35 am Anyone ever tried watching Asuka's mind rape while on an hallucinogen? I can only imagine the mental apocalypse...

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon May 02, 2011 12:42 pm Eva Yojimbo wrote: Anyone ever tried watching Asuka's mind rape while on an hallucinogen? I can only imagine the mental apocalypse...

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Mon May 02, 2011 12:51 pm Ornette wrote: Watching something on a screen or a TV is surprisingly dull while on hallucinogens.

[]:             Quote Post by Someone » Mon May 02, 2011 1:04 pm Ur all mad.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Mon May 02, 2011 1:13 pm Drunk or not, it still doesn't make sense. So, not much of a difference.

[]:             Quote Post by Someone » Mon May 02, 2011 1:32 pm ^Got a point there.

[]:             Quote Post by Tarnsman » Mon May 02, 2011 2:26 pm the_seventh_child wrote: Drunk or not, it still doesn't make sense. So, not much of a difference.

[]:             Quote Post by zpoop » Mon May 02, 2011 6:02 pm Ornette wrote: Watching something on a screen or a TV is surprisingly dull while on hallucinogens.

[]:             Quote Post by Jessemon » Mon May 02, 2011 6:29 pm I'd like to try watching EoE while tripping, but I wouldn't even know where to start looking for the goods. I've led a pretty sheltered life.

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Mon May 02, 2011 7:03 pm If one were to watch NGE drunk they should chose Yebisu to accomplish the task, yes?

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Mon May 02, 2011 8:00 pm Trajan wrote: If one were to watch NGE drunk they should chose Yebisu to accomplish the task, yes?

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Mon May 02, 2011 8:24 pm Trajan wrote: If one were to watch NGE drunk they should chose Yebisu to accomplish the task, yes?
